title: Phileas Redaction Policy
description: Schema for a Phileas redaction policy JSON file. A policy defines which types of sensitive information to detect and how to redact or transform each type.

config.description: Global configuration settings for the policy.

crypto.description: AES encryption settings used by the CRYPTO_REPLACE strategy.

fpe.description: Format-preserving encryption settings used by the FPE_ENCRYPT_REPLACE strategy.

identifiers.description: Defines which types of sensitive information to detect and how to handle each type.

ignored.description: Lists of terms to ignore globally during filtering.

ignoredPatterns.description: Regex patterns to ignore globally during filtering.

graphical.description: Graphical redaction settings for image and PDF redaction.

config.description: Global configuration settings for the policy.

splitting.description: Controls whether and how input text is split into smaller chunks before filtering.
Controls whether and how input text is split into smaller chunks before filtering.

threshold.description: Character count threshold above which text is split.

redactionColor.description: Color of the redaction box drawn over redacted text in PDFs.

showReplacement.description: Whether to render replacement text inside the redaction box.

replacementFont.description: Font used for replacement text in PDFs.

replacementMaxFontSize.description: Maximum font size for replacement text in PDFs.

replacementFontColor.description: Color of the replacement text in PDFs.

compressionQuality.description: JPEG compression quality for PDF output (0.0 to 1.0).

preserveUnredactedPages.description: Whether to preserve pages that contain no redactions in their original form.

removeTrailingPeriods.description: Remove trailing periods from redacted output.

removeTrailingSpaces.description: Remove trailing spaces from redacted output.

removeTrailingNewLines.description: Remove trailing newlines from redacted output.

crypto.description: AES-GCM encryption settings used by the CRYPTO_REPLACE strategy. A fresh random nonce is generated per value, so no initialization vector is configured. Values may be prefixed with 'env:' to read from environment variables.

key.description: AES encryption key. Prefix with 'env:' to read from an environment variable (e.g. 'env:CRYPTO_KEY').

fpe.description: Format-preserving encryption settings used by the FPE_ENCRYPT_REPLACE strategy. Values may be prefixed with 'env:' to read from environment variables.

key.description: FPE encryption key. Prefix with 'env:' to read from an environment variable.

tweak.description: FPE tweak value. Prefix with 'env:' to read from an environment variable.

ignored.description: A named list of terms to ignore during filtering.

files.description: Paths to files containing terms to ignore (one term per line).

ignoredPattern.description: A named regex pattern whose matches are ignored during filtering.

pattern.description: Java-compatible regular expression. Matches are excluded from filtering.

graphical.description: Graphical redaction settings for image and PDF redaction.

boundingBoxes.description: Fixed bounding boxes to redact in images or PDFs.

boundingBox.description: A rectangular region to redact in an image or PDF page.

color.description: Fill color for the redaction box.

x.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner.

y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner.

enabled.description: Whether this bounding box is active.

ignoredFiles.description: Paths to files containing values to ignore.

ignoredPatterns.description: Regex patterns whose matches are ignored.

windowSize.description: Context window size (number of surrounding tokens to consider).

priority.description: Priority of this filter relative to others. Higher values take precedence.

identifiers.description: Defines which types of sensitive information to detect and how to handle each type.

city.description: Detects city names using dictionary matching.

county.description: Detects county names using dictionary matching.

date.description: Detects date values in various formats.

dictionaries.description: Custom dictionary filters. Each entry defines a set of terms to detect.

firstName.description: Detects first names using dictionary matching.

hospital.description: Detects hospital names using dictionary matching.

identifiers.description: Custom regex-based identifier filters. Each entry defines a pattern to detect.

medicalCondition.description: Detects medical conditions using PhEye AI-based detection.

sections.description: Section-based filters. Each entry defines a start/end pattern pair to redact.

state.description: Detects U.S. state names using dictionary matching.

surname.description: Detects surnames/last names using dictionary matching.

trackingNumber.description: Detects shipping tracking numbers (UPS, FedEx, USPS).

zipCode.description: Detects U.S. ZIP codes (5-digit and ZIP+4 formats).

abstractFilterProperties.description: Common properties inherited by all filters.

ignored.description: Specific values to ignore for this filter.

ignoredFiles.description: Paths to files containing values to ignore for this filter.

ignoredPatterns.description: Regex patterns whose matches are ignored by this filter.

windowSize.description: Context window size (number of surrounding tokens to consider).

priority.description: Priority of this filter relative to others. Higher values take precedence.

baseFilterStrategy.description: Common properties for all filter strategies.

id.description: Unique identifier for this strategy instance. Auto-generated if not provided.

redactionFormat.description: Format string for REDACT strategy. Supports placeholders: %t (filter type), %v (original value), %l (label).

replacementScope.description: Scope for consistent replacements. DOCUMENT: same token always gets same replacement within a document. CONTEXT: same token gets same replacement within a context.

maskLength.description: Length of the mask. SAME preserves the original length. Can also be a number for fixed-length masking.

truncateLeaveCharacters.description: Number of characters to leave visible when using TRUNCATE strategy.

truncateCharacter.description: Character used to replace truncated portions.

truncateDirection.description: Which end of the value to truncate.

condition.description: Conditional expression that must be satisfied for this strategy to apply. Supports fields: token, context, confidence, population. Operators: startswith, ==, !=, >, <, >=, <=, is, is not. Multiple conditions joined with &&. Example: 'confidence > 0.9', 'token startswith "5"', 'population < 4500', 'token is birthdate'.

salt.description: Whether to add a random salt to hashed values (HASH_SHA256_REPLACE).

anonymizationCandidates.description: Custom candidate values for FROM_LIST anonymization method.

dateFilterStrategy.description: A filter strategy for date values. Supports all base strategies plus date-specific strategies: TRUNCATE_TO_YEAR, SHIFT, and RELATIVE.

id.description: Unique identifier for this strategy instance. Auto-generated if not provided.

strategy.description: The redaction/replacement strategy to apply. Date filters support additional strategies: TRUNCATE_TO_YEAR, SHIFT, and RELATIVE.

redactionFormat.description: Format string for REDACT strategy. Supports placeholders: %t (filter type), %v (original value), %l (label).

maskLength.description: Length of the mask. SAME preserves the original length.

truncateLeaveCharacters.description: Number of characters to leave visible when using TRUNCATE strategy.

truncateCharacter.description: Character used to replace truncated portions.

truncateDirection.description: Which end of the value to truncate.

condition.description: Conditional expression that must be satisfied for this strategy to apply. Date filters support: 'token is birthdate', 'token is deathdate', 'token is birthdate or deathdate'.

salt.description: Whether to add a random salt to hashed values.

anonymizationCandidates.description: Custom candidate values for FROM_LIST anonymization method.

shiftRandom.description: Whether to shift dates by a random amount (SHIFT strategy).

shiftDays.description: Number of days to shift dates (SHIFT strategy).

shiftMonths.description: Number of months to shift dates (SHIFT strategy).

shiftYears.description: Number of years to shift dates (SHIFT strategy).

futureDates.description: Whether shifted dates may land in the future (SHIFT strategy).

ageFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected age values.

bankRoutingNumberFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected bank routing numbers.

bitcoinFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected Bitcoin addresses.

filterCity.description: Detects city names using dictionary matching.

cityFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected city names.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of city names.

filterCounty.description: Detects county names using dictionary matching.

countyFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected county names.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of county names.

creditCardFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected credit card numbers.

onlyValidCreditCardNumbers.description: Only detect numbers that pass Luhn checksum validation.

ignoreWhenInUnixTimestamp.description: Ignore sequences that appear to be Unix timestamps.

onlyWordBoundaries.description: Only detect numbers at word boundaries.

currencyFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected currency values.

filterCustomDictionary.description: Detects terms from a user-defined dictionary.

customFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected custom dictionary terms.

classification.description: Classification label assigned to matches from this dictionary.

files.description: Paths to files containing terms to detect (one term per line).

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of terms.

filterDate.description: Detects date values in various formats.

dateFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected dates. Supports date-specific strategies: TRUNCATE_TO_YEAR, SHIFT, RELATIVE.

onlyValidDates.description: Only detect strings that parse as valid calendar dates.

driversLicenseFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected driver's license numbers.

emailAddressFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected email addresses.

onlyValidTLDs.description: Only detect emails with recognized top-level domains.

filterFirstName.description: Detects first names using dictionary matching.

firstNameFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected first names.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of first names.

filterHospital.description: Detects hospital names using dictionary matching.

hospitalFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected hospital names.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of hospital names.

ibanCodeFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected IBAN codes.

onlyValidIBANCodes.description: Only detect codes that pass IBAN checksum validation.

filterIdentifier.description: Detects custom identifiers using a user-defined regex pattern.

identifierFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected custom identifiers.

pattern.description: Java-compatible regular expression to match identifiers.

groupNumber.description: Regex capture group number to extract as the identifier (0 = entire match).

classification.description: Classification label assigned to matches from this identifier.

ipAddressFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected IP addresses.

macAddressFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected MAC addresses.

filterMedicalCondition.description: Detects medical conditions using PhEye AI-based detection.

medicalConditionFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected medical conditions.

phEyeConfiguration.description: Configuration for connecting to a PhEye AI service.

removePunctuation.description: Remove punctuation from text before sending to the AI model.

thresholds.description: Confidence thresholds per label. Detections below the threshold are discarded.

passportNumberFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected passport numbers.

filterPhEye.description: PhEye AI-based entity detection filter. Uses a remote AI model to detect entities.

phEyeFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling entities detected by PhEye.

phEyeConfiguration.description: Configuration for connecting to a PhEye AI service.

removePunctuation.description: Remove punctuation from text before sending to the AI model.

thresholds.description: Confidence thresholds per label. Detections below the threshold are discarded.

phEyeConfiguration.description: Configuration for connecting to a PhEye AI service.

endpoint.description: URL of the PhEye service endpoint.

bearerToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the PhEye service.

maxIdleConnections.description: Maximum number of idle HTTP connections to maintain.

phoneNumberFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected phone numbers.

phoneNumberExtensionFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected phone number extensions.

physicianNameFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected physician names.

filterSection.description: Detects and redacts sections of text bounded by start and end regex patterns.

startPattern.description: Java-compatible regex that marks the beginning of a section to redact.

endPattern.description: Java-compatible regex that marks the end of a section to redact.

filterState.description: Detects U.S. state names using dictionary matching.

stateFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected state names.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of state names.

stateAbbreviationFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected state abbreviations.

streetAddressFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected street addresses.

filterSurname.description: Detects surnames/last names using dictionary matching.

fuzzy.description: Enable fuzzy matching for approximate matches.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level controlling match strictness when fuzzy matching is enabled.

capitalized.description: Only match capitalized variants of surnames.

filterTrackingNumber.description: Detects shipping tracking numbers (UPS, FedEx, USPS).

trackingNumberFilterStrategies.description: Strategies for handling detected tracking numbers.

requireHttpWwwPrefix.description: Only detect URLs that start with http://, https://, or www.

filterZipCode.description: Detects U.S. ZIP codes (5-digit and ZIP+4 formats).

zipCodeFilterStrategy.description: Strategies for handling detected ZIP codes. Note: this property name is singular for backwards compatibility but accepts an array.

requireDelimiter.description: Require a delimiter (hyphen) between the 5-digit and 4-digit parts of ZIP+4 codes.

validate.description: Validate that detected ZIP codes are real U.S. ZIP codes.

sensitivityLevel.description: Controls how strictly fuzzy matching is applied. Higher sensitivity means more matches.
